summary.en: Software that turns rental buildings into Virtual Power Plants.
summary.zh: 將出租建築轉變為虛擬電廠的軟體。

highlight.en: Glow Energy lets rental property owners aggregate buildings into Virtual Power Plants, benefiting tenants, owners, and clean energy developers.
highlight.zh: Glow Energy 讓出租物業業主將建築整合為虛擬電廠,為房客、業主與潔淨能源開發商帶來效益。

summary.en: Agentic workflows for complex, long-running business operations.
summary.zh: 為複雜、長時間運行的業務流程打造的代理式工作流。

highlight.en: Workflow86 lets teams build and orchestrate custom AI agents via a visual canvas or natural language, with human-in-the-loop steps and integrations.
highlight.zh: Workflow86 讓團隊透過視覺化畫布或自然語言建構並協調自訂 AI 代理,支援人工介入步驟與系統整合。

summary.en: We teach UX/UI design and then help people land great jobs.
summary.zh: 我們教授 UX/UI 設計,並協助學員找到優質工作。

highlight.en: Avocademy makes design education affordable for career-changers, with a student body that is 75% women, 65% BIPOC, and 33% LGBTQ+.
highlight.zh: Avocademy 讓設計教育對轉職者更平價,學員中 75% 為女性、65% 為有色人種、33% 為 LGBTQ+。

summary.en: Vision-powered warehouse automation that runs on a mobile device.
summary.zh: 以視覺技術驅動、可在行動裝置上運行的倉儲自動化。

highlight.en: Powerhouse AI uses a phone camera to automate inventory counting, label scanning, and document reading, improving warehouse efficiency 20-40%.
highlight.zh: Powerhouse AI 利用手機相機自動完成盤點、標籤掃描與文件讀取,將倉儲效率提升 20% 至 40%。

summary.en: A no-code tool for building LLM-powered applications and workflows.
summary.zh: 用於建構 LLM 驅動應用與工作流的無程式碼工具。

highlight.en: Query Vary connects input software to an LLM to output software, with use cases like piping sales-call data into a CRM, plus reliability tooling.
highlight.zh: Query Vary 將輸入軟體經 LLM 串接至其他軟體,應用如將業務通話資料匯入 CRM,並提供確保工作流可靠的工具。

summary.en: An agent-to-agent network that searches every home, on or off market.
summary.zh: 搜尋所有房源(無論是否上市)的房仲對房仲媒合網路。

highlight.en: Trusty matches real estate agents directly to surface homes not yet listed, giving buyers fresh inventory and homeowners private offers.
highlight.zh: Trusty 直接媒合房仲以挖掘尚未掛牌的房源,為買家提供新庫存、為屋主帶來私下報價。

summary.en: Manage and automate customer onboarding and implementation.
summary.zh: 管理並自動化客戶導入與實施流程。

highlight.en: Onboard.io creates dynamic, per-customer launch plans that clients can collaborate on, built by a team with a decade of onboarding experience.
highlight.zh: Onboard.io 建立可依客戶客製的動態啟動計畫供客戶協作,由具十年導入經驗的團隊打造。

summary.en: Access the startup asset class through vetted private companies.
summary.zh: 透過經審查的私人公司進入新創資產類別。

highlight.en: Attack Capital offers exposure to a diversified, vetted group of seed-stage companies from recent YC batches, spanning AI to climate tech.
highlight.zh: Attack Capital 讓投資人接觸近期 YC 批次中經審查、多元化的種子期公司,涵蓋 AI 到氣候科技。

summary.en: Plaid for utilities: one API to access user energy data.
summary.zh: 公用事業界的 Plaid:用單一 API 取得使用者能源資料。

highlight.en: Pelm's API lets companies query hourly electricity usage or transfer service across hundreds of US utilities through one integration.
highlight.zh: Pelm 的 API 讓企業透過單一整合,即可查詢全美數百家公用事業的每小時用電量或轉移服務。

summary.en: AI enabling digital urine diagnostics at home.
summary.zh: 以 AI 實現居家數位尿液診斷。

highlight.en: Starling's toilet-indwelling mass spectroscopy device monitors urine to catch early changes, aiming to prevent hospitalizations from UTIs, BPH, and diabetes.
highlight.zh: Starling 的馬桶內置質譜儀監測尿液以察覺早期變化,旨在預防尿道感染、攝護腺肥大與糖尿病導致的住院。

summary.en: Instant, hyper-personalized, AI-powered sales outreach messages.
summary.zh: 即時、高度個人化、由 AI 生成的銷售外展訊息。

highlight.en: CoffeeAI researches prospects and personalizes every part of an outbound email or LinkedIn message in about 10 seconds.
highlight.zh: CoffeeAI 約在 10 秒內研究潛在客戶並個人化外送郵件或 LinkedIn 訊息的每個環節。

summary.en: Making 'real' cow and human milk via mammalian cell culture.
summary.zh: 以哺乳動物細胞培養製造『真正的』牛奶與人奶。

highlight.en: Brown Foods produces UnReal Milk, lab-grown whole milk from cell culture that matches dairy's taste with no animals and an 82% lower carbon footprint.
highlight.zh: Brown Foods 生產 UnReal Milk,以細胞培養製成的全脂奶,口感如乳製品、無需動物且碳足跡降低 82%。

summary.en: The system of action for conversation data.
summary.zh: 對話資料的行動系統。

highlight.en: Spinach AI turns raw conversations into structured knowledge for people, agents, and LLMs across the enterprise, used by firms like Abnormal AI and eToro.
highlight.zh: Spinach AI 將原始對話轉化為結構化知識,供企業內人員、代理與 LLM 使用,客戶包括 Abnormal AI 與 eToro。

summary.en: Enterprise AI for businesses.
summary.zh: 面向企業的人工智慧。

highlight.en: Iron Leap builds enterprise AI solutions for businesses.
highlight.zh: Iron Leap 為企業打造面向企業的 AI 解決方案。

summary.en: AI that builds go-to-market assets in seconds.
summary.zh: 在數秒內產出進入市場(GTM)素材的 AI。

highlight.en: Criya reads a company's data to produce hyper-personalized, client-ready assets in one click, replacing 85% of account-based marketing effort in 60 seconds.
highlight.zh: Criya 讀取公司資料,一鍵產出高度個人化、可直接交付客戶的素材,並在 60 秒內取代 85% 的客戶導向行銷工作。

summary.en: Managed sales email delivery for cold outreach.
summary.zh: 為冷外展提供的代管銷售郵件投遞服務。

highlight.en: Lightmeter is turn-key outreach infrastructure that integrates with tools like Apollo to land mail in inboxes, with plans from 50 to 7,500 emails per day.
highlight.zh: Lightmeter 是一站式外展基礎設施,可整合 Apollo 等工具將郵件送達收件匣,方案涵蓋每日 50 至 7,500 封郵件。

summary.en: A Netflix-style Japanese comic subscription service.
summary.zh: 類似 Netflix 的日本漫畫訂閱服務。

highlight.en: Omoi (formerly Azuki) unlocks all manga on the service for $4.99 a month, while free users access select chapters with ads.
highlight.zh: Omoi(前身為 Azuki)以每月 4.99 美元解鎖平台上所有漫畫,免費用戶則可在有廣告下閱讀部分章節。

summary.en: An AI-native cloud platform for inference, sandboxes, and agents.
summary.zh: 為推論、沙箱與代理打造的 AI 原生雲端平台。

highlight.en: Beam is a cloud platform purpose-built for AI inference, sandboxes, and agents.
highlight.zh: Beam 是專為 AI 推論、沙箱與代理打造的雲端平台。

summary.en: All-in-one spend management for businesses in Latin America.
summary.zh: 為拉丁美洲企業打造的一站式支出管理平台。

highlight.en: Cardda gives Latin American businesses tools for bill payments, automated local transfers, and corporate cards in one platform.
highlight.zh: Cardda 在單一平台上為拉丁美洲企業提供帳單支付、自動化在地轉帳與企業卡等工具。

summary.en: The complete way to communicate compensation.
summary.zh: 溝通薪酬的完整方式。

highlight.en: Complete helps companies communicate compensation, starting with interactive offer letters.
highlight.zh: Complete 協助企業溝通薪酬,從互動式錄取通知書開始。

summary.en: Learn English by speaking with an AI.
summary.zh: 透過與 AI 對話來學習英語。

highlight.en: Toko helps East Asian learners reach fluency through short AI conversations across 500+ topics, ranking top 3 in Taiwan's App Store for Education.
highlight.zh: Toko 透過涵蓋 500 多個主題的簡短 AI 對話協助東亞學習者達到流利,並在台灣 App Store 教育類排名前三。

summary.en: A UPI-based credit card for college students in India.
summary.zh: 為印度大學生打造、以 UPI 為基礎的信用卡。

highlight.en: PayCrunch uses alternative credit scoring to offer a Pay Later option on UPI to the 150M+ Indians shut out of formal credit.
highlight.zh: PayCrunch 運用替代信用評分,為 1.5 億多名無法取得正規信貸的印度人提供 UPI 上的先買後付選項。

summary.en: An AI performance marketing agent for entrepreneurs and growth teams.
summary.zh: 為創業者與成長團隊打造的 AI 成效行銷代理。

highlight.en: Sprites AI runs paid ad campaigns across Meta, Google, LinkedIn, Reddit, and TikTok plus SEO, letting founders scale without large specialist teams.
highlight.zh: Sprites AI 在 Meta、Google、LinkedIn、Reddit 與 TikTok 上執行付費廣告並處理 SEO,讓創辦人無需大型專家團隊即可擴張。

summary.en: High-precision, closed-loop neuromodulation devices.
summary.zh: 高精度、閉迴路的神經調節裝置。

highlight.en: Torpedo Therapeutics builds implantable devices that sense and stimulate brain activity to improve deep brain stimulation for Parkinson's and epilepsy.
highlight.zh: Torpedo Therapeutics 打造可感測並刺激腦部活動的植入式裝置,以改善用於帕金森氏症與癲癇的深腦刺激療法。

summary.en: A developer-first native integration platform for go-to-market tools.
summary.zh: 以開發者為先、為進入市場工具打造的原生整合平台。

highlight.en: Vessel lets developers integrate with customers' CRMs and sales tools via unified APIs for speed, an actions API for depth, ETL, and open-source connectors.
highlight.zh: Vessel 讓開發者透過統一 API、actions API、ETL 與開源連接器,整合客戶的 CRM 與業務工具。

summary.en: An AI deal-screening analyst for commercial real estate acquisitions.
summary.zh: 為商業地產收購打造的 AI 交易篩選分析師。

highlight.en: Nophin's fine-tuned multimodal agent Cresa screens multifamily deals, analyzes documents, and generates reports around the clock for acquisition teams.
highlight.zh: Nophin 經微調的多模態代理 Cresa 全天候為收購團隊篩選多戶住宅交易、分析文件並產出報告。

summary.en: A one-stop shop for convenience store inventory.
summary.zh: 便利商店進貨的一站式平台。

highlight.en: Attain replaces the weekly grind of ordering from 10-15 suppliers with one app offering reliable supply, price transparency, and product discovery.
highlight.zh: Attain 以單一 App 取代向 10 至 15 家供應商逐週下單的繁瑣流程,提供穩定供貨、價格透明與商品探索。

summary.en: Team-based authentication for B2B SaaS.
summary.zh: 為 B2B SaaS 打造的團隊型身分驗證。

highlight.en: PropelAuth gives startups Slack-grade auth out of the box with hosted UIs, then scales via APIs, plus user and org features like analytics and billing.
highlight.zh: PropelAuth 以代管 UI 為新創開箱即用地提供 Slack 等級身分驗證,並可透過 API 擴展,還附帶分析與計費等功能。

summary.en: Run compute-intensive apps in a browser.
summary.zh: 在瀏覽器中運行運算密集型應用。

highlight.en: Jamsocket makes it as easy as deploying a web server to give every user a dedicated backend, the architecture behind apps like Figma and GitHub Codespaces.
highlight.zh: Jamsocket 讓為每位使用者配置專屬後端如同部署網頁伺服器一樣簡單,正是 Figma 與 GitHub Codespaces 採用的架構。

summary.en: A chatbot teaching K-12 math in developing countries.
summary.zh: 在開發中國家透過聊天機器人教授 K-12 數學。

highlight.en: Darsel is an AI math chatbot that supplements K-12 education in resource-constrained settings via SMS, WhatsApp, and Facebook Messenger.
highlight.zh: Darsel 是一款 AI 數學聊天機器人,透過簡訊、WhatsApp 與 Facebook Messenger 在資源有限環境中補強 K-12 教育。

summary.en: Simplifying loans between friends and family.
summary.zh: 簡化親友之間的借貸。

highlight.en: Pigeon is a relationship-based platform for creating and managing loans between friends, family, and people who trust one another.
highlight.zh: Pigeon 是一個以關係為基礎的平台,用於建立並管理親友及彼此信任者之間的借貸。

summary.en: The operating system for the construction industry.
summary.zh: 營建業的作業系統。

highlight.en: HippoBuild automates back-office functions and the supply chain for SMB construction firms, charging a SaaS fee plus 1% on better-sourced materials.
highlight.zh: HippoBuild 為中小型營建公司自動化後勤功能與供應鏈,收取 SaaS 費用並對更優價採購的材料加收 1%。

summary.en: Custom AI harnesses for enterprises.
summary.zh: 為企業打造的客製化 AI 框架。

highlight.en: WorldQL builds custom AI harnesses tailored to enterprise needs.
highlight.zh: WorldQL 為企業需求打造客製化的 AI 框架。

summary.en: An API router for AI agents.
summary.zh: 為 AI 代理打造的 API 路由器。

highlight.en: AgentRouter lets AI agents discover, pay for, and execute APIs.
highlight.zh: AgentRouter 讓 AI 代理探索、支付並執行 API。

summary.en: Orca, an MIT open-source terminal-based agent orchestrator.
summary.zh: Orca,基於終端機的 MIT 開源代理協調器。

highlight.en: Orca is a terminal-based ADE for engineers running 10 to 100 coding agents at once, working with any agent like Claude Code or Codex on your own subscription.
highlight.zh: Orca 是基於終端機的 ADE,讓工程師同時運行 10 到 100 個編碼代理,可搭配 Claude Code、Codex 等任何代理使用自有訂閱。

summary.en: Financing the next generation of infrastructure projects.
summary.zh: 為下一代基礎設施專案提供融資。

highlight.en: Perl Street democratizes structured finance for sustainable infrastructure and hardware, already securing startups over $140M in debt financing offers.
highlight.zh: Perl Street 為永續基礎設施與硬體普及結構化融資,已協助新創取得逾 1.4 億美元的債務融資提案。

summary.en: Classify anything: train and deploy ML models in minutes.
summary.zh: 分類任何事物:數分鐘內訓練並部署機器學習模型。

highlight.en: Nyckel lets anyone train a state-of-the-art classification model in minutes and instantly deploy it to production-grade infrastructure.
highlight.zh: Nyckel 讓任何人都能在數分鐘內訓練出頂尖的分類模型,並立即部署至生產級基礎設施。

summary.en: Turnkey co-ownership and management of premium properties.
summary.zh: 頂級物業的一站式共有與管理。

highlight.en: Pursuit coordinates small groups of ten or fewer owners to co-own top-tier recreational properties worldwide and manages them for enjoyment and returns.
highlight.zh: Pursuit 籌組十人以下的小型業主群,共同擁有全球頂級休閒物業,並代為管理以兼顧使用樂趣與投資增值。

summary.en: Banking built from the ground up for Gen Z.
summary.zh: 從零為 Z 世代打造的銀行服務。

highlight.en: Orca is a financial hub for Gen Z to send money instantly, split bills with groups, access local perks, and spend and save in one app.
highlight.zh: Orca 是為 Z 世代打造的金融樞紐,可在單一 App 中即時轉帳、分攤帳單、取得在地優惠並消費與儲蓄。

summary.en: Automated contract review with AI.
summary.zh: 以 AI 自動化合約審查。

highlight.en: Dioptra builds founders' and in-house counsels' negotiation playbooks and automates them with AI to streamline negotiations and close deals faster.
highlight.zh: Dioptra 為創辦人與內部法律顧問建立談判劇本並以 AI 自動化,簡化合約談判並加速成交。

summary.en: A serverless infrastructure platform for AI applications.
summary.zh: 為 AI 應用打造的無伺服器基礎設施平台。

highlight.en: Cerebrium offers serverless GPUs with low cold-start times and 12+ chip varieties, used by Tavus and Twilio, with customers seeing 40% cost savings.
highlight.zh: Cerebrium 提供低冷啟動的無伺服器 GPU 與超過 12 種晶片,客戶包括 Tavus 與 Twilio,可節省 40% 成本。

summary.en: We make it simple for call centers to automate quality assurance.
summary.zh: 讓客服中心輕鬆自動化品質保證。

highlight.en: MosaicVoice listens to customer calls in real time and alerts agents and managers to compliance violations as they happen.
highlight.zh: MosaicVoice 即時聆聽客戶通話,並在合規違規發生當下提醒專員與主管。

summary.en: Wills and estate management for crypto.
summary.zh: 為加密貨幣打造的遺囑與遺產管理。

highlight.en: Bifrost writes smart contracts that act as an on-chain dead-man's switch, transferring self-custodied assets to loved ones at end of life.
highlight.zh: Bifrost 撰寫智慧合約作為鏈上的『死人開關』,在臨終時將自我託管的資產轉移給親人。

summary.en: An automated sweep account to invest without speculating.
summary.zh: 自動化掃帳戶,投資不必猜測市場。

highlight.en: Soon attaches to your bank account and uses routine spending to signal trades, investing on a schedule and selling gains when you spend.
highlight.zh: Soon 連結你的銀行帳戶,以日常消費作為交易訊號,定期投資並在消費時賣出獲利。

summary.en: AI agents that rewrite and optimize internal documentation for LLMs.
summary.zh: 為 LLM 重寫並優化內部文件的 AI 代理。

highlight.en: RefineTrain's AI agents clean, de-conflict, and distill context into messy internal knowledge so LLMs produce substantially better results.
highlight.zh: RefineTrain 的 AI 代理清理、消除衝突並萃取脈絡至雜亂的內部知識,讓 LLM 產出顯著更佳的結果。

summary.en: Get your brand discovered and recommended by ChatGPT.
summary.zh: 讓你的品牌被 ChatGPT 發現並推薦。

highlight.en: Siftly is SEO for the AI era, tracking how brands are surfaced and recommended inside ChatGPT, Gemini, and Perplexity to win AI-driven discovery.
highlight.zh: Siftly 是 AI 時代的 SEO,追蹤品牌在 ChatGPT、Gemini 與 Perplexity 中如何被呈現與推薦,以贏得 AI 驅動曝光。

summary.en: A modern investment product for 100M underserved Europeans.
summary.zh: 為 1 億名服務不足的歐洲人打造的現代投資產品。

highlight.en: Pluto.markets targets the 100M Europeans in non-Euro countries who have seen no investing innovation in 30 years, replacing high commissions and clunky tools.
highlight.zh: Pluto.markets 瞄準非歐元區、30 年來未見投資創新的 1 億歐洲人,取代高佣金與笨拙工具。

summary.en: AI agents for CFOs and finance teams.
summary.zh: 為財務長與財務團隊打造的 AI 代理。

highlight.en: Finnt's AI agents run controllership and accounting to deliver ERP-ready journals and financial reports in under five minutes, with audit trail.
highlight.zh: Finnt 的 AI 代理執行管控與會計,在五分鐘內產出可匯入 ERP 的分錄與財務報表,並附審計軌跡。

summary.en: On-demand blue-collar labor that's actually good.
summary.zh: 真正優質的隨需藍領人力。

highlight.en: Airwork is an on-demand marketplace for premium blue-collar workers, filling 98% of shifts within two hours, with customers like Tesla and Toronto Pearson.
highlight.zh: Airwork 是優質藍領工人的隨需媒合平台,兩小時內填補 98% 的班次,客戶包括 Tesla 與多倫多皮爾遜機場。

summary.en: Empowering mass spectrometry for biotech and beyond.
summary.zh: 為生技及更廣領域賦能質譜分析。

highlight.en: Andson Biotech helps pharma get fast, accurate measurements of hard-to-detect chemicals tested thousands of times daily when making cell therapies.
highlight.zh: Andson Biotech 協助製藥公司快速準確地測量在製造細胞療法與生物製劑時每天測試數千次的難測化學物質。

summary.en: AI to prepare you for the future of your career.
summary.zh: 以 AI 為你的職涯未來做好準備。

highlight.en: Trueplace uses AI to supercharge career preparation.
highlight.zh: Trueplace 運用 AI 大幅強化職涯準備。

summary.en: Share casual moments with the people you care about.
summary.zh: 與你在乎的人分享日常時刻。

highlight.en: Housewarming is social media and AI designed to bring you closer to friends rather than isolate you, from the team behind viral apps Discz and Internet Bedroom.
highlight.zh: Housewarming 是一款社群媒體與 AI 產品,旨在拉近你與朋友的距離,出自打造 Discz 與 Internet Bedroom 等爆紅 App 的團隊。

summary.en: A direct-to-consumer marketplace and influencer network for brands.
summary.zh: 為品牌打造的直接面向消費者市集與網紅網路。

highlight.en: WANTD gives fashion and footwear brands what Shopify can't: live commerce, marketplace and auction channels, influencer networks, and fulfillment.
highlight.zh: WANTD 為時尚與鞋類品牌提供 Shopify 所欠缺的能力:直播電商、市集與拍賣通路、網紅網路與訂單履行。

summary.en: An AI-native virtual address and mailroom for businesses.
summary.zh: 為企業打造的 AI 原生虛擬地址與收發室。

highlight.en: Postal gives businesses an official address for government and vendor mail, with AI that summarizes mail and recommends compliance actions.
highlight.zh: Postal 為企業提供用於政府與供應商郵件的正式地址,並以 AI 摘要郵件並建議合規行動。

summary.en: Oral drugs to halt neurodegeneration.
summary.zh: 用以阻止神經退化的口服藥物。

highlight.en: Origami Therapeutics develops protein degraders that eliminate toxic proteins, with a first indication of Huntington's disease and molecules reaching the brain.
highlight.zh: Origami Therapeutics 開發可清除毒性蛋白的蛋白降解劑,首個適應症為亨丁頓舞蹈症,其分子能進入腦部。

summary.en: Make diesel semi trucks hybrid-electric.
summary.zh: 讓柴油聯結車變成油電混合動力。

highlight.en: Revoy's SixWheel makes diesel trucks hybrid-electric in three minutes at zero upfront cost, while delivering $25k more profit per truck each year.
highlight.zh: Revoy 的 SixWheel 可在三分鐘內、零前期成本下讓柴油卡車變成油電混合動力,並為每輛卡車每年多帶來 2.5 萬美元利潤。

summary.en: Create professional proposals, quotes, and documents in seconds.
summary.zh: 在數秒內製作專業的提案、報價與文件。

highlight.en: Powerdocs is an AI-powered platform that helps businesses, agencies, and freelancers create professional proposals, quotes, and requirement documents.
highlight.zh: Powerdocs 是 AI 驅動平台,協助企業、代理商與自由工作者製作專業的提案、報價與需求文件。

summary.en: Deploy secure, scalable cloud infrastructure in minutes, not days.
summary.zh: 在數分鐘而非數天內部署安全、可擴展的雲端基礎設施。

highlight.en: Massdriver lets teams build production-ready internal developer platforms with 50+ components on Kubernetes, serverless, or VMs, running in your own cloud.
highlight.zh: Massdriver 讓團隊以超過 50 個元件,在 Kubernetes、無伺服器或 VM 上建構可上線的內部開發者平台,並在你自己的雲端中運行。

summary.en: A natural hydrogel to keep internal organs scar-free after surgery.
summary.zh: 術後讓內部器官免於疤痕的天然水凝膠。

highlight.en: TYBR Health's naturally derived hydrogel coats tendons at the end of surgery to limit internal scarring and improve healing for tendon and ligament patients.
highlight.zh: TYBR Health 的天然來源水凝膠在手術結束時塗覆於肌腱,以減少內部疤痕並改善肌腱與韌帶患者的癒合。

summary.en: A real-time sales coach for SDRs.
summary.zh: 為業務開發代表打造的即時銷售教練。

highlight.en: Trellus delivers action-oriented prompts like 'pause' or 'set next steps' in real time as reps speak, helping more SDRs hit quota faster.
highlight.zh: Trellus 在業務通話當下即時提供如『暫停』或『設定後續步驟』等行動導向提示,協助更多業務代表更快達標。

summary.en: Growing micro-organs to find new drugs.
summary.zh: 培育微型器官以尋找新藥。

highlight.en: Rosebud Biosciences screens drugs against patient-matched organoids, a Stanford-validated technology that already found a pediatric heart disease drug target.
highlight.zh: Rosebud Biosciences 以與患者基因相符的類器官篩選藥物,這項經史丹佛驗證的技術已找出小兒心臟病藥物標靶。

summary.en: Run bioinformatics pipelines in the cloud.
summary.zh: 在雲端執行生物資訊學分析流程。

highlight.en: FlowDeploy helps bioinformaticians run, develop, and share Nextflow and Snakemake pipelines while eliminating footguns like idle spend and data egress.
highlight.zh: FlowDeploy 協助生物資訊學家執行、開發並分享 Nextflow 與 Snakemake 分析流程,同時消除閒置花費與資料外傳等陷阱。

summary.en: Share sounds with other musicians online.
summary.zh: 在線上與其他音樂人分享聲音素材。

highlight.en: Supertone makes it easy to find and share audio samples with musicians around the world.
highlight.zh: Supertone 讓音樂人輕鬆與世界各地的人尋找並分享音訊素材。

summary.en: A catheter-based solution to treat chronic heart failure.
summary.zh: 以導管為基礎治療慢性心臟衰竭的方案。

highlight.en: Corveus Medical's catheter device performs a targeted nerve ablation in the upper abdomen while confirming correct placement, easing collateral-damage concerns.
highlight.zh: Corveus Medical 的導管裝置在上腹部執行精準神經消融並確認位置正確,化解周邊組織受損的疑慮。

summary.en: An API for shared, embeddable web browsers.
summary.zh: 用於共享、可嵌入網頁瀏覽器的 API。

highlight.en: Hyperbeam's API embeds virtual computers anywhere with synchronized audio/video and multi-user control, streaming over 1.25M hours of video monthly.
highlight.zh: Hyperbeam 的 API 可在任何地方嵌入虛擬電腦,並同步音訊/視訊與多人操控,每月串流逾 125 萬小時影片。

summary.en: An embedded finance platform for Latin America.
summary.zh: 為拉丁美洲打造的嵌入式金融平台。

highlight.en: Valari lets any company embed financial products into its platform through simple APIs, aiming to democratize access to financial services across Latin America.
highlight.zh: Valari 讓任何公司透過簡單 API 在自家平台中嵌入金融產品,旨在普及拉丁美洲的金融服務取得。

summary.en: A modern medical reference app for healthcare providers.
summary.zh: 為醫療人員打造的現代醫療參考 App。

highlight.en: Pyrls is a web and mobile reference that helps clinicians prescribe, dispense, and educate patients, trusted by 50,000+ clinicians and trainees.
highlight.zh: Pyrls 是一款網頁與行動參考工具,協助臨床人員開立、調劑藥物並衛教,獲超過 5 萬名臨床人員與受訓者信賴。

summary.en: AI-powered product description enhancement for the auto parts industry.
summary.zh: 為汽車零件業打造的 AI 商品描述強化工具。

highlight.en: Versable uses a fine-tuned LLM with RAG to instantly generate market-ready titles, descriptions, and specs from a part number, replacing manual catalog work.
highlight.zh: Versable 運用結合 RAG 的微調 LLM,僅憑零件編號即可即時產出可上架的標題、描述與規格,取代緩慢的人工編目。

summary.en: The easiest way to set up Zero Trust Access for your team.
summary.zh: 為團隊設定零信任存取最簡單的方式。

highlight.en: Firezone replaces traditional VPNs with a least-privileged Zero Trust approach, letting teams define granular policies via lightweight WireGuard clients.
highlight.zh: Firezone 以最小權限的零信任方式取代傳統 VPN,讓團隊透過輕量的 WireGuard 用戶端定義細緻政策。

summary.en: Zero-knowledge security without seed phrases or backup codes.
summary.zh: 無需助記詞或備份碼的零知識安全防護。

highlight.en: Bunkyr's hardware-secured API gives apps zero-knowledge, end-to-end encryption with a familiar password-recovery method, removing the usual UX burdens.
highlight.zh: Bunkyr 以硬體保護的 API 讓應用具備零知識與端對端加密,並提供熟悉的密碼復原方式,消除常見的使用者體驗負擔。

summary.en: Helping physicians select the right therapy for breast cancer patients.
summary.zh: 協助醫師為乳癌患者選擇正確的療法。

highlight.en: NearWave's handheld imaging device helps physicians choose effective breast cancer therapies, sparing patients months of side effects from failed treatments.
highlight.zh: NearWave 的手持影像裝置協助醫師選擇有效的乳癌療法,讓患者免於因無效治療而承受數月副作用。

summary.en: Open-source software that cleans and transforms messy healthcare data.
summary.zh: 清理並轉換雜亂醫療資料的開源軟體。

highlight.en: Tuva Health makes open-source software to fix the data quality problem blocking scalable healthcare data products, aiming to be the industry's open standard.
highlight.zh: Tuva Health 製作開源軟體以解決阻礙可擴展醫療資料產品的資料品質問題,目標成為產業的開放標準。

summary.en: An investment super app for Latin America.
summary.zh: 為拉丁美洲打造的投資超級 App。

highlight.en: Botin is a one-stop mobile app where people in Latin America can invest in US stocks, crypto, and more—the investment tools of the wealthiest 1%.
highlight.zh: Botin 是一站式行動 App,讓拉丁美洲民眾投資美股、加密貨幣等,提供最富有 1% 才有的投資工具。

summary.en: A new kind of notebook for data storytelling.
summary.zh: 用於資料敘事的新型筆記本。

highlight.en: Livedocs blends Python, SQL, charts, and dynamic text in a fast, shareable, collaborative medium for building data-rich docs and apps.
highlight.zh: Livedocs 在快速、可分享、可協作的媒介中融合 Python、SQL、圖表與動態文字,用以建構資料豐富的文件與應用。

summary.en: Software for enterprises to track and reduce supply chain emissions.
summary.zh: 讓企業追蹤並減少供應鏈排放的軟體。

highlight.en: Aklimate has enterprises give suppliers free carbon management tools in exchange for their emissions data, like a 'Watershed-lite' paid for per supplier.
highlight.zh: Aklimate 讓企業免費提供供應商碳管理工具以換取排放資料,等同為每家供應商買單的『精簡版 Watershed』。

summary.en: Automatically fill empty appointment slots for beauty professionals.
summary.zh: 為美業專業人士自動填補空檔預約時段。

highlight.en: Lovage detects open slots from cancellations, generates on-brand content, and distributes it to channels like Instagram where clients can book instantly.
highlight.zh: Lovage 偵測因取消產生的空檔,生成符合品牌的內容並發布到 Instagram 等通路,讓客戶即時預約。

summary.en: Easily invest like the rich.
summary.zh: 輕鬆像有錢人一樣投資。

highlight.en: Benson helps everyday people identify the best stocks to invest in, guiding them on when to buy, how much to invest, and when to sell.
highlight.zh: Benson 協助一般人辨識最值得投資的股票,並指引何時買進、投入多少以及何時賣出。

summary.en: Automate prospect research at scale.
summary.zh: 大規模自動化潛在客戶研究。

highlight.en: Ponyrun evaluates people from a search URL or list against your criteria, reviewing sources like LinkedIn to decide whether to sell to or interview them.
highlight.zh: Ponyrun 依你的標準評估來自搜尋網址或名單的人選,檢視 LinkedIn 等來源以判斷是否該向其銷售或面試。

summary.en: Two-way syncs between business tools and your database.
summary.zh: 在業務工具與你的資料庫之間進行雙向同步。

highlight.en: Bracket is a two-way data pipeline that keeps tools like Salesforce and Airtable in sync with backend databases, so ops and engineers see the same data.
highlight.zh: Bracket 是雙向資料管線,讓 Salesforce、Airtable 等工具與後端資料庫保持同步,使營運與工程團隊看到相同資料。

summary.en: An investing app for Muslims.
summary.zh: 為穆斯林打造的投資 App。

highlight.en: Amal Invest removes the burden of identifying Shariah-compliant investments, letting users filter both stocks and funds once for a tailored set of options.
highlight.zh: Amal Invest 免除辨識符合伊斯蘭教法投資的負擔,讓使用者一次設定即可篩選股票與基金,取得量身打造的選項。

summary.en: Credit card checkout for NFTs.
summary.zh: 為 NFT 提供的信用卡結帳服務。

highlight.en: Winter is Stripe for NFT purchases, making it easy to buy and sell NFTs with a credit card.
highlight.zh: Winter 是 NFT 購買版的 Stripe,讓人輕鬆以信用卡買賣 NFT。

summary.en: The full-stack platform for specialty pharma.
summary.zh: 為特殊藥品打造的全方位平台。

highlight.en: Float Health connects SuperNurses to in-home medication visits, moving care that doesn't need a hospital into the home to make it safer and cheaper.
highlight.zh: Float Health 將 SuperNurses 連結至居家用藥訪視,把不需住院的照護移至家中,使醫療更安全、更省錢。

summary.en: Addressing loneliness and isolation for seniors.
summary.zh: 解決長者的孤獨與孤立問題。

highlight.en: Reviving Mind is an in-network telehealth provider that improves outcomes and adherence for lonely, chronically ill seniors via curated virtual support groups.
highlight.zh: Reviving Mind 是一家網路內遠距醫療服務商,透過精心策劃的虛擬支持團體,改善孤獨且患有慢性病長者的療效與依從性。

summary.en: Personalize your landing site for each visitor in one line of code.
summary.zh: 只需一行程式碼即可為每位訪客客製化你的著陸頁。

highlight.en: Kenobi acts as a concierge for your marketing site, tailoring content to each visitor to boost conversion, installed with a single head tag.
highlight.zh: Kenobi 如同你行銷網站的禮賓人員,依每位訪客量身打造內容以提升轉換,只需一個 head 標籤即可安裝。

summary.en: A crypto wallet for web3 startups.
summary.zh: 為 web3 新創打造的加密貨幣錢包。

highlight.en: Cashmere is a multisig Solana wallet that lets enterprises securely manage digital assets as a team instead of running their business from one person's wallet.
highlight.zh: Cashmere 是多重簽章的 Solana 錢包,讓企業以團隊方式安全管理數位資產,而非用單一個人錢包經營業務。

summary.en: Answer 70% of your support and sales questions, instantly.
summary.zh: 即時回答 70% 的客服與銷售問題。

highlight.en: Nara lets SMBs build AI sales agents for their websites and social media that give personalized shopping recommendations and answer questions 24/7.
highlight.zh: Nara 讓中小企業為其網站與社群媒體打造 AI 銷售代理,提供個人化購物建議並全天候回答問題。

summary.en: Control all of your investments from a single app.
summary.zh: 在單一 App 中掌控你所有的投資。

highlight.en: TAI lets millennial investors trade and manage all their accounts in one app, using algorithms and market themes to surface insights for improving portfolios.
highlight.zh: TAI 讓千禧世代投資者在單一 App 中交易並管理所有帳戶,運用演算法與市場主題提供改善投資組合的洞察。

summary.en: AI agents for pharma drug launches.
summary.zh: 為製藥公司新藥上市打造的 AI 代理。

highlight.en: Cellbyte's AI agents help pharma launch drugs worldwide, answering questions like what price a new drug can achieve in the US versus Germany.
highlight.zh: Cellbyte 的 AI 代理協助製藥公司在全球推出藥品,回答諸如新藥在美國相對德國能達到何種定價等問題。

summary.en: AI search for the next generation.
summary.zh: 為下一世代打造的 AI 搜尋。

highlight.en: Andi is an ad-free, privacy-focused search chatbot that uses generative AI and live data to give factually correct answers, cutting through SEO spam and ads.
highlight.zh: Andi 是無廣告、注重隱私的搜尋聊天機器人,運用生成式 AI 與即時資料提供事實正確的答案,擺脫 SEO 垃圾與廣告。

summary.en: Fast, professional content creation with AI audio, image, and video.
summary.zh: 以 AI 音訊、影像與影片快速打造專業內容。

highlight.en: Uberduck offers audio, image, and video generation plus enterprise APIs, with text-to-speech and voice conversion powering AI remixes and marketing content.
highlight.zh: Uberduck 提供音訊、影像與影片生成及企業 API,其文字轉語音與語音轉換技術為 AI 混音與行銷內容提供動力。
